test_refs: independent: schedule-graph.py current/stale Beads parity probes
IN1.observed: Independent 2026-07-20 audit confirmed incomplete gates admit 0 nodes. In mixed Beads/GitHub/none probes, Beads was admitted only when receipt graph_status/graph_depends_on exactly matched the current node; a stale dependency receipt was excluded with beads_parity_stale_or_unconfirmed.

OUT1.observed: 2026-07-22 再取得 (r7)。本 PR の guard hook 変更と main merge で behavior closure が動いたため再実走した。sync が --apply で graph を書き換える干渉を避けるため、schedule 専用の fixture を分離して生成している。Live-trial verdict overall=PASS (launch/completion/goal_fit/verdict すべて PASS), tier=live, downgrade_reason=null, transcript_layer=jsonl, nudge=0/gate=0 (自走)。R3 を Agent へ分離して --max-parallel 4 で実行し、独立 C17 verifier Agent が C24 receipt・実行 receipt・graph・canonical lease ledger を実際に読んで ready/batch/lease authority を再計算し verified=true。graph/tracker/lease の digest は実行前後で不変 (read-only)。orchestrator と別個体の fresh evaluator が graph から ready-set を独立再計算して厳密一致を確認し blocker 0 で PASS。

OUT2.observed: Independent audit and focused tests confirmed conflict-free batches, scope/max limits, expired-lease exclusion, and graph/tracker/lease digest stability. A rogue lease path in a Git repository and an eval-log symlink root were rejected before output; only git-common-dir/dev-graph/leases.json was accepted as authority.
